IMPORTANT INFORMATION!

In Master's programs with thesis, in order for those who have reached the thesis defense stage to take the defense exam; It is required to have submitted a research article to a national or international refereed journal.

In master's thesis programs, research article submissions to a national or international refereed journal are required.
